zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Knivton於大約1420年出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾維其福德時，她的父親Henry Knyveton16歲，母親Elizabeth Bagot22歲。她於1435年與Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾斯坦福 奧 姆，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾維其福德。

nameMeanings.name: Knivton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Kniveton (Derbys) or Kneeton (Notts).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Knivton was born about 1420, in Wichenford, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Henry Knyveton, was 16 and her mother, Elizabeth Bagot, was 22. She married Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire in 1435. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 7 daughters. She died in Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Wichenford, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, Englan: Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Knivton est née environ 1420, à Wichenford, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry Knyveton, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Bagot, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire en 1435. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée à Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Wichenford, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, Englan: Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Knivton um 1420 in Wichenford, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Knyveton 16 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Bagot 22. Sie hat 1435 Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb in Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wichenford, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Knivton è nata il circa 1420 nel Wichenford, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Henry Knyveton, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Bagot, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire nel 1435. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Wichenford, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Knivtonが約1420年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウィチェンフォードで生まれた時，父Henry Knyvetonは16歳，母Elizabeth Bagotは22歳であった。1435年にNormon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアスタンフォード オン テメで死去し，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウィチェンフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Knivton(이)가 대략 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 위천퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Knyveton(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Bagot(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1435년 Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 스탠퍼드  테에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 위천퍼드에 묻혔다.

ru.Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, Englan: станфорд он тем, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Knivton родилась около 1420 г. в местности вичэнфорд, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henry Knyveton было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Bagot, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire в 1435 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла в местности станфорд он тем, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности вичэнфорд, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
